title: ClearLab Flu+COVID19 Antigen Assay IFU
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dcpfe","text":" Indication:  Qualitative detection of the nucleocapsid protein antigen from SARS-CoV-2 in nasopharyngeal aspirate specimens directly or after the aspirate have been added to viral transport media from individuals who are suspected of COVID-19 by their healthcare provider. Emergency use of this test is limited to authorized laboratories and other authorized testing locations.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Collect specimen with Clearinse Nasal Wash Aspiration System
Pipette 100 uL out from specimen chamber (up to first mark of graduated transfer pipette)
Dispense entire sample from pipette into the assay cassette's extraction well.
Then, pipette 50uL reagent into the assay cassette's extraction well and let sit for one minute.
Raise assay cassette upright and let stand for 2 seconds
Lay device back down and read results in 10 minutes.
creator: petercb3
